mapper.sql: select project_id as projectId, project_code as projectCode, project_name as projectName, project_type as projectType, project_status as projectStatus, project_phase as projectPhase, owner_dept_id as ownerDeptId, project_manager as projectManager, owner_leader as ownerLeader, vendor_name as vendorName, vendor_owner as vendorOwner, portal_owner as portalOwner, resource_owner as resourceOwner, data_owner as dataOwner, security_owner as securityOwner, target_users as targetUsers, directory_template_json as directoryTemplateJson, custom_directory_json as customDirectoryJson, acceptance_status as acceptanceStatus, plan_start_date as planStartDate, plan_end_date as planEndDate, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime, remark from inf_project
mapper.insert: insert into inf_project ( project_code, project_name, project_type, project_status, project_phase, owner_dept_id, project_manager, owner_leader, vendor_name, vendor_owner, portal_owner, resource_owner, data_owner, security_owner, target_users, directory_template_json, custom_directory_json, acceptance_status, plan_start_date, plan_end_date, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{projectCode}, #{projectName}, #{projectType}, #{projectStatus}, #{projectPhase}, #{ownerDeptId}, #{projectManager}, #{ownerLeader}, #{vendorName}, #{vendorOwner}, #{portalOwner}, #{resourceOwner}, #{dataOwner}, #{securityOwner}, #{targetUsers}, #{directoryTemplateJson}, #{customDirectoryJson}, #{acceptanceStatus}, #{planStartDate}, #{planEndDate}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.delete:
delete from inf_project where project_id in
#{projectId}
